description: Wah Kee is a secret society based in Malaysia and Singapore since the nineteenth century. Founded in Singapore by Sū Guǎnghuá, it operates in multiple countries including Australia, Thailand, Vietnam, China, Hong Kong, the United States, Canada, and New Zealand. The group is involved in heroin trafficking in the region.
